content: VkusVill Sale Monitor: Python backend (FastAPI), React miniapp (Vite), 3 scrapers (green/red/yellow) using nodriver CDP, cart API via requests, Telegram bot notifications. Cookies-based auth for VkusVill session.

All scrapers migrated from undetected_chromedriver to nodriver (CDP) due to Chrome 145 incompatibility. Chrome launched via subprocess.Popen + nodriver connect_existing. Cookies injected via CDP Network.setCookies with CookieParam objects. nodriver evaluate returns deep-serialized objects that need _deserialize() helper.

Red: https://vkusvill.ru/offers/?F[212][]=284&F[DEF_3]=1&sf4=Y&statepop | Yellow: https://vkusvill.ru/offers/?F[DEF_3]=1&sf4=Y&statepop | Green: cart page https://vkusvill.ru/cart/ (needs login). OOS boundary: stop loading at "Не осталось" text.
